scripts.check: node --check js/app.js && node --check js/engine.js && node --check functions/index.js && node --check scripts/run_waivers.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:offline
scripts.test:offline: node test/sim.test.js && node test/dgw.test.js && node test/engine.parity.test.js
scripts.test:emu: DATA_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8126 firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.emu.json --project calciopoli-wc26 'node test/rules.test.js && node test/functions.test.js && node test/migrate.test.js'
